title: Factory Blocks
body:
# Factory Blocks
[Chipped is Required](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped) or
[Chisel is Required](https://modrinth.com/mod/chisel-reborn),  
[Continuity Recommended](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) or [Athena Recommended](https://modrinth.com/mod/athena-ctm)  

Also, yes you can use Chisel and Chipped at the same time, same with Athena and Continuity
## Images
